hero.imageAlt: Pixel art reaper of the Nightmare clan
hero.motto: Death arrives in silence. The nightmare remains.
hero.description: A clan built for organized war, a strong Discord presence, and a dark theatrical identity that turns every castle into haunted territory.

values.title: A dark theater for players who move as one.
values.description: Nightmare blends war discipline, Discord presence, and a visual identity designed to feel like an urban legend inside Rune-Midgard.

items.title: Cold war
items.description: Clean calls, marked targets, and coordinated movement to control the map without chaos.

items.title: Present clan
items.description: An active group for leveling, farming, parties, and talking even outside event time.

items.title: Dark style
items.description: Necrotic blue identity, pixel art, and a visual presence made to be remembered.

items.title: Come together
items.description: Anyone who joins with respect becomes part of the pack. No drama, no inflated ego.

items.title: Straight talk
items.description: We speak clearly, improve together, and hold the line when the game gets rough.

items.title: As one
items.description: MVP, farm, instance, or WoE: if it is on the list, Nightmare does it together.

agenda.title: Next chapter
agenda.description: A guild panel to keep the crew ready before the castle opens.
agenda.eventTitle: The War of Emperium has arrived
agenda.copy: A guild panel to remind the crew: review builds, prepare supplies, and join voice before the first recall.

recruitment.title: Join the nightmare
recruitment.description: Enter the Discord, meet the crew, and see if Nightmare fits the way you play Ragnarok.
